violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. - Found brats sitting on counter thawing.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Dates missing from food items in reach-in
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. - Fryer found not under hood completely
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. - Missing in freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Hoods in need of cleaning.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. - New test strips that can test the acid sanitizer
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. - Hand wash sink being used as a dumb sink.
General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. - No screens on windows, windows found open.
